subject: [DCAEGEN2] Updates for R10
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Updates for R10

By default, disable all dcaegen2 components except
config-binding-service, healthcheck,
and ves-openapi-manager.

Fix DNS name for the ONAP consul instance.

Move mongodb dependency from dcae-bootstrap to dcae-tcagen2.

Fix the generation of the JSON list of expected components for the
healthcheck services. (Previously could have a spurious leading
",")

Update healthcheck-container version to 2.3.0 for
logging enhancements and updated base image.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2968
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2958
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2983
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflos@sonoris.net>
Change-Id: I4bcce1d3e43e2e5c7cc2c3179870de72b55d5d2e

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4091/ : FAILURE

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 86 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: By default, disable all dcaegen components except config-binding-service, healthcheck, ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4091/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4091/ )

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

+ Michal and Krzysztof K

Holmes charts is also using consul-init (org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.consul-loader-container:1.0.0); need the service named env changed on the both holmes component deployment). This could done part of this change or separate - I'm good either way.

And the Gating test job failures are expected (corresponding tests dependent on cloudify should be disabled/migrated)
